product_overview: ContextOS Dashboard provides developers with observability and management for LLM apps — showing usage and cost metrics, browsing and deleting memories, inspecting conversation sessions and call payloads, managing prompt versions, and adjusting local project settings.
core_goals: Inspect recent LLM calls and see token/cost breakdowns for the last 30 days
Browse, filter, and delete stored memories for a given user (including GDPR bulk deletion)
View conversation sessions and expand to read full message history
Manage prompt templates and versions with deploy and rollback controls
Debug context payloads sent to the model including token breakdown and JSON payload inspection
Review analytics charts and export cost data as CSV
Adjust local project settings (API key reveal/copy, model/provider, memory and privacy options)

features.name: Overview Metrics
features.description: High-level project summary showing aggregate LLM usage, costs, token trends, recent calls, and an SDK quick-start sample.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See total calls, total tokens, total cost, and memory status summary cards -> Inspect the token usage chart for the last 30 days -> Review recent call rows or observe the empty state when no calls exist -> Read the SDK quick start sample code
Navigate to / -> Observe empty state when there is no usage data available

features.name: Memory Management
features.description: Browse stored memories, filter by developer user ID or category, delete individual memories, and perform GDPR bulk deletion of all memories for a user.
user_flows: Navigate to /memory -> Enter a user ID and submit the filter -> Apply a category filter to narrow results (All, personal, preference, goal, context) -> Select a memory to delete and confirm deletion -> Initiate GDPR bulk delete, enter the user ID, and confirm bulk deletion
Navigate to /memory -> Initiate GDPR bulk delete -> Submit with an empty user ID -> See a validation error preventing the deletion

features.name: Session History
features.description: List conversation sessions and expand a session to load and read its message history between user and assistant.
user_flows: Navigate to /sessions -> See the session table or observe the empty state when no sessions exist -> Expand a session row to load message history -> Read user and assistant messages in the expanded view -> Collapse the session row

features.name: Prompt Version Control
features.description: List prompt templates and their immutable versions, inspect version content and metadata, deploy versions to environments, and rollback to previous versions (prompt creation UI is not present).
user_flows: Navigate to /prompts -> Select a prompt template from the template list -> Review a version's content, declared variables, deployment labels, and timestamps -> Deploy a non-production version to an environment -> Rollback to a previous eligible version and confirm the rollback

features.name: Context Debugger
features.description: Inspect recent LLM calls with a timeline and open any call to view prompt/completion token breakdowns and the full JSON context and response payloads.
user_flows: Navigate to /debugger -> View the call timeline or observe the empty state when no calls are logged -> Select a call in the timeline to inspect -> Review prompt and completion token breakdown bars -> Read the JSON context payload and response payload for the selected call

features.name: Analytics Reporting
features.description: Visualize usage and cost charts, review a cost breakdown table, and export model cost data as a CSV for offline analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to /analytics -> Review total cost, model count, and selected period summary cards -> Inspect daily token usage and cost-by-model charts -> Review rows in the cost breakdown table -> Click export to download model cost data as CSV

features.name: Project Settings
features.description: Local project settings to reveal/copy the API key, choose provider/model, and edit memory, compression, budget, and privacy fields (note: changes are stored in local UI state and do not persist after navigation or reload).
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Reveal the API key and then hide it -> Copy the API key and observe clipboard confirmation -> Change provider and model selection values -> Edit memory, compression, budget, and privacy input fields -> Click Save Changes and observe the local UI reflecting the updated values

routes.description: Overview dashboard with aggregate usage, costs, token chart, recent calls, and SDK quick start sample.
Memory store browser with user ID search, category filters, single-memory delete, and GDPR bulk delete prompt flow.
Conversation sessions table with expandable session message history.
Prompt template list and version history view with deploy and rollback controls.
Context debugger with call timeline and detailed payload inspector.
Analytics page with daily token chart, cost-by-model chart, cost breakdown table, and CSV export.
Project settings UI for API key reveal/copy, LLM provider/model, memory/compression, budget, and privacy fields.

features.name: Overview Metrics
features.description: Displays high-level LLM usage, cost, recent call, and token usage chart data for the last 30 days.
user_interactions: Open the Overview route.
Review total calls, total tokens, total cost, and memory status cards.
Inspect the token usage chart.
Review recent call rows or the empty state.
Read the SDK quick start code sample.

features.name: Memory Management
features.description: Lets users view memories, filter by user ID or category, delete individual memories, and bulk-delete user memories.
user_interactions: Open the Memory route.
Type a user ID in the filter input and press Enter.
Click category filter chips for All, personal, preference, goal, and context.
Click a memory delete icon and confirm deletion.
Click GDPR Delete, enter a user ID, and confirm bulk deletion.

features.name: Session History
features.description: Shows conversation sessions and allows expanding a session to load its message history.
user_interactions: Open the Sessions route.
Review the session table or empty state.
Click a session row to expand it.
Review user and assistant messages.
Click the expanded row again to collapse it.

features.name: Prompt Version Control
features.description: Displays prompt templates, template versions, deployment state, deploy actions, and rollback actions.
user_interactions: Open the Prompts route.
Select a prompt template from the template list.
Review version content, variables, deployment labels, and timestamps.
Click Deploy on a non-production version.
Click Rollback on an eligible version and confirm.

features.name: Context Debugger
features.description: Displays recent LLM calls and lets users inspect token breakdown, context payload, and response payload.
user_interactions: Open the Debugger route.
Review the call timeline or empty state.
Click a call in the timeline.
Inspect prompt and completion token bars.
Review JSON context and response payloads.

features.name: Analytics Reporting
features.description: Shows usage, cost charts, cost breakdown rows, and exports model cost data as CSV.
user_interactions: Open the Analytics route.
Review total cost, model count, and period cards.
Inspect daily token usage and cost-by-model charts.
Review the cost breakdown table.
Click Export CSV.

features.name: Project Settings
features.description: Provides local settings controls for API key display/copy, model/provider selection, memory settings, budget, and privacy fields.
user_interactions: Open the Settings route.
Click Reveal and Hide for the API key.
Click Copy for the API key.
Change provider and model select values.
Edit memory, compression, budget, and mask field inputs.
Click Save Changes.

known_limitations.issue: Dashboard authentication is not implemented; a demo API key is read from localStorage or hard-coded fallback.
known_limitations.impact: Test cases should not expect a login flow.

known_limitations.issue: Settings page stores changes only in local React state and the Save Changes button has no persistence handler.
known_limitations.impact: Settings changes do not persist after navigation or reload.

known_limitations.issue: Prompt creation UI is not present despite API helper methods existing.
known_limitations.impact: Test cases should focus on listing/selecting/deploying/rollback, not creating new templates.

known_limitations.issue: Memory creation UI is not present despite API helper methods existing.
known_limitations.impact: Test cases should create memories through backend setup or existing seed data, not through the dashboard.
